1502: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
1503:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1504:   if (!claimed) {
1505:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1506:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1507:       try {
1508:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1509:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1510:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1511:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1512:         }
1513:       }
1514:       return;
1515:     }
1516: 
1517:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1518:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1519:       return;
1520:     }
1521: 
1522:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1523:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1524:         if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1525:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_stale');
1526:           return;
1527:         }
1528:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1529:           workspaceId,
1530:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1531:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1532:         });
1533:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1534:           workspaceId,
1535:           deploymentId,
1536:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1537:           payload: {
1538:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1539:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1540:           },
1541:         });
1542:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1543:           deploymentId,
1544:           status: 'failed',
1545:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1546:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1547:         });
1548:         return;
1549:       }
1550: 
1551:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1552:         if (existing.providerDeploymentId) {
1553:           try {
1554:             const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1555:             const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1556:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1557:             const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(existing.providerDeploymentId);
1558: 
1559:             if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1560:               await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1561:               return;
1562:             }
1563: 
1564:             if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1565:               if (!existing.sourceSnapshotSha256 || !existing.sourceBundleKey) {
1566:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment success metadata not yet available; retry requested');
1567:               }
1568:               const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? existing.deployedUrl ?? null;
1569:               const existingResult =
1570:                 existing.result && typeof existing.result === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existing.result)
1571:                   ? (existing.result as Record<string, unknown>)
1572:                   : {};
1573:               const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1574:               const requestProvenance =
1575:                 requestPayload?.provenance && typeof requestPayload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(requestPayload.provenance)
1576:                   ? (requestPayload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1577:                   : {};
1578:               const existingArtifact =
1579:                 existingResult.artifact && typeof existingResult.artifact === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.artifact)
1580:                   ? (existingResult.artifact as Record<string, unknown>)
1581:                   : {};
1582:               const existingProvenance =
1583:                 existingResult.provenance && typeof existingResult.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.provenance)
1584:                   ? (existingResult.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1585:                   : {};
1586:               const successResult = {
1587:                 ...existingResult,
1588:                 url: deployedUrl,
1589:                 artifact: {
1590:                   sourceBundleKey: existing.sourceBundleKey,
1591:                   sourceSnapshotSha256: existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1592:                   outputBundleSha256:
1593:                     typeof existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 : null,
1594:                   outputDir: typeof existingArtifact.outputDir === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputDir : null,
1595:                 },
1596:                 provenance: {
1597:                   ...existingProvenance,
1598:                   workspaceId,
1599:                   taskId:
1600:                     typeof requestProvenance.taskId === 'string'
1601:                       ? requestProvenance.taskId
1602:                       : (existingProvenance.taskId ?? null),
1603:                   operationId:
1604:                     typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
1605:                       ? requestProvenance.operationId
1606:                       : (existingProvenance.operationId ?? null),
1607:                   trigger:
1608:                     typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1609:                       ? requestProvenance.trigger
1610:                       : typeof existingProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1611:                         ? existingProvenance.trigger
1612:                         : 'manual',
1613:                 },
1614:                 rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(requestPayload?.rollbackOnFailure, true),
1615:                 reconciled: true,
1616:                 fromCancelRequested: true,
1617:               };
1618:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'succeeded', {
1619:                 workspaceId,
1620:                 deployedUrl,
1621:                 providerDeploymentId: existing.providerDeploymentId,
1622:                 sourceSnapshotSha256: existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1623:                 sourceBundleKey: existing.sourceBundleKey,
1624:                 result: successResult,
1625:                 errorCode: null,
1626:                 errorMessage: null,
1627:               });
1628:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1629:                 workspaceId,
1630:                 deploymentId,
1631:                 eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1632:                 payload: {
1633:                   deployedUrl,
1634:                   reconciled: true,
1635:                   fromCancelRequested: true,
1636:                 },
1637:               });
1638:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1639:                 deploymentId,
1640:                 status: 'succeeded',
1641:                 deployedUrl,
1642:                 errorCode: null,
1643:                 errorMessage: null,
1644:               });
1645:               return;
1646:             }
1647: 
1648:             if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1649:               const errorCode = providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed';
1650:               const errorMessage = providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed';
1651:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1652:                 workspaceId,
1653:                 errorCode,
1654:                 errorMessage,
1655:               });
1656:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1657:                 workspaceId,
1658:                 deploymentId,
1659:                 eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1660:                 payload: { code: errorCode, message: errorMessage },
1661:               });
1662:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1663:                 deploymentId,
1664:                 status: 'failed',
1665:                 errorCode,
1666:                 errorMessage,
1667:               });
1668:               return;
1669:             }
1670:           } catch {
1671:             // Best-effort reconciliation only.
1672:           }
1673:         }
1674: 
1675:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1676:       }
1677: 
1678:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
1679:     }
1680:     return;
1681:   }
1682: 
1683:   try {
1684:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
1685:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
1686:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1687:         workspaceId,
1688:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1689:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1690:       });
1691:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1692:         workspaceId,
1693:         deploymentId,
1694:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1695:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
1696:       });
1697:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1698:         deploymentId,
1699:         status: 'failed',
1700:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1701:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1702:       });
1703:       return;
1704:     }
1705: 
1706:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1707:   } catch (error) {
1708:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1709:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
1710:       try {
1711:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1712:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1713:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1714:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1715:         }
1716:       }
1717:       return;
1718:     }
1719: 
1720:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1721:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1722:       return;
1723:     }
1724: 
1725:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
1726:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1727:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1728:         true
1729:       );
1730:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1731: 
1732:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1733:         workspaceId,
1734:         errorCode: error.code,
1735:         errorMessage: error.message,
1736:         result: { rollback },
1737:       });
1738:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1739:         workspaceId,
1740:         deploymentId,
1741:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1742:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
1743:       });
1744:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1745:         deploymentId,
1746:         status: 'failed',
1747:         errorCode: error.code,
1748:         errorMessage: error.message,
1749:       });

1862: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
1863:   env: Env,
1864:   workspaceId: string,
1865:   deploymentId: string,
1866:   maxCycles = 8
1867: ): Promise<void> {
1868:   async function reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
1869:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1870:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running' || !latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
1871:       return false;
1872:     }
1873: 
1874:     if (!latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1875:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_inline');
1876:       return true;
1877:     }
1878: 
1879:     try {
1880:       const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1881:       const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1882:       const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1883:       const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(latest.providerDeploymentId);
1884: 
1885:       if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1886:         await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1887:         return true;
1888:       }
1889: 
1890:       if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1891:         if (!latest.sourceSnapshotSha256 || !latest.sourceBundleKey) {
1892:           return false;
1893:         }
1894:         const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? latest.deployedUrl ?? null;
1895:         const latestResult =
1896:           latest.result && typeof latest.result === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latest.result)
1897:             ? (latest.result as Record<string, unknown>)
1898:             : {};
1899:         const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1900:         const requestProvenance =
1901:           requestPayload?.provenance && typeof requestPayload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(requestPayload.provenance)
1902:             ? (requestPayload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1903:             : {};
1904:         const latestArtifact =
1905:           latestResult.artifact && typeof latestResult.artifact === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latestResult.artifact)
1906:             ? (latestResult.artifact as Record<string, unknown>)
1907:             : {};
1908:         const latestProvenance =
1909:           latestResult.provenance && typeof latestResult.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latestResult.provenance)
1910:             ? (latestResult.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1911:             : {};
1912:         const successResult = {
1913:           ...latestResult,
1914:           url: deployedUrl,
1915:           artifact: {
1916:             sourceBundleKey: latest.sourceBundleKey,
1917:             sourceSnapshotSha256: latest.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1918:             outputBundleSha256: typeof latestArtifact.outputBundleSha256 === 'string' ? latestArtifact.outputBundleSha256 : null,
1919:             outputDir: typeof latestArtifact.outputDir === 'string' ? latestArtifact.outputDir : null,
1920:           },
1921:           provenance: {
1922:             ...latestProvenance,
1923:             workspaceId,
1924:             taskId:
1925:               typeof requestProvenance.taskId === 'string' ? requestProvenance.taskId : (latestProvenance.taskId ?? null),
1926:             operationId:
1927:               typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
1928:                 ? requestProvenance.operationId
1929:                 : (latestProvenance.operationId ?? null),
1930:             trigger:
1931:               typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1932:                 ? requestProvenance.trigger
1933:                 : typeof latestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1934:                   ? latestProvenance.trigger
1935:                   : 'manual',
1936:           },
1937:           rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(requestPayload?.rollbackOnFailure, true),
1938:           reconciled: true,
1939:           fromInlineCancelRequested: true,
1940:         };
1941:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'succeeded', {
1942:           workspaceId,
1943:           deployedUrl,
1944:           providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1945:           sourceSnapshotSha256: latest.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1946:           sourceBundleKey: latest.sourceBundleKey,
1947:           result: successResult,
1948:           errorCode: null,
1949:           errorMessage: null,
1950:         });
1951:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1952:           workspaceId,
1953:           deploymentId,
1954:           eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1955:           payload: {
1956:             deployedUrl,
1957:             reconciled: true,
1958:             fromInlineCancelRequested: true,
1959:           },
1960:         });
1961:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1962:           deploymentId,
1963:           status: 'succeeded',
1964:           deployedUrl,
1965:           errorCode: null,
1966:           errorMessage: null,
1967:         });
1968:         return true;
1969:       }
1970: 
1971:       if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1972:         const errorCode = providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed';
1973:         const errorMessage = providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed';
1974:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1975:           workspaceId,
1976:           errorCode,
1977:           errorMessage,
1978:         });
1979:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1980:           workspaceId,
1981:           deploymentId,
1982:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1983:           payload: { code: errorCode, message: errorMessage },
1984:         });
1985:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1986:           deploymentId,
1987:           status: 'failed',
1988:           errorCode,
1989:           errorMessage,
1990:         });
1991:         return true;
1992:       }
1993:     } catch {
1994:       // Best-effort inline reconciliation only.
1995:     }
1996: 
1997:     return false;
1998:   }
1999: 
2000:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
2001:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2002:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
2003:       return false;
2004:     }
2005: 
2006:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
2007:       return false;
2008:     }
2009: 
2010:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
2011:       return false;
2012:     }
2013: 
2014:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
2015:       workspaceId,
2016:       startedAt: null,
2017:       finishedAt: null,
2018:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
2019:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
2020:     });
2021:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2022:       workspaceId,
2023:       deploymentId,
2024:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
2025:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
2026:     });
2027:     return true;
2028:   }
2029: 
2030:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
2031:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
2032:     try {
2033:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2034:     } catch (error) {
2035:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /cancel requested while running/i.test(error.message)) {
2036:         if (cycle < maxCycles - 1) {
2037:           await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
2038:           continue;
2039:         }
2040: 
2041:         const reconciled = await reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment();
2042:         if (!reconciled) {
2043:           await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
2044:             workspaceId,
2045:             startedAt: null,
2046:             finishedAt: null,
2047:             errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
2048:             errorMessage: 'Inline cancel reconciliation deferred; retry scheduled',
2049:           });
2050:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2051:             workspaceId,
2052:             deploymentId,
2053:             eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
2054:             payload: {
2055:               attemptCount: null,
2056:               maxRetries: null,
2057:               inlineCancelReconcileDeferred: true,
2058:             },
2059:           });
2060:         }
2061:         return;
2062:       }
2063: 
2064:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
2065:         return;

parts.text:
Found 2 blocking issues in `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts`:

- Reconciliation can mark deployment `succeeded` with no URL, which breaks parity with the primary success path and can persist incomplete success metadata. In both reconciliation branches, `deployedUrl` is allowed to become `null` and is still written into success result/state (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1568`, `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1894`, then success update at `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1618`, `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1941`). The main path explicitly blocks this (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1287`).

- Reconciled success does not update workspace summary `deployedAt`, so summary metadata is still not parity-complete versus the normal success path. Normal path sets `deployedAt` (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1355`), but both reconciliation summary updates omit it (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1638`, `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1961`).
